# Children's Online Privacy Protection Rule

Jurisdiction: United States - Federal
Region: US-FED
Citation: Children's Online Privacy Protection Rule
Authority: Federal Trade Commission / eCFR
Source URL: https://www.ecfr.gov/current/title-16/chapter-I/subchapter-C/part-312
Topics: children_data, consent, notice_transparency, data_subject_rights, retention_deletion
Keywords: COPPA, children under 13, verifiable parental consent, online service

## Summary
US children's online privacy rule governing collection of personal information from children under 13.

## Key compliance obligations
- Provide direct notice and online privacy notice.
- Obtain verifiable parental consent unless an exception applies.
- Limit retention and allow parental review/deletion.
